text: Has anyone else ever noticed how a lot of big YTPers have just gone MIA and have remained dormant for years? SwishFilmsInc, CraaazyCat13, KroboProductions and DeeperCutt just to name a few. I'm sure there are plenty others I am forgetting at the moment.
author: @MrCrossa238

text: Krobo is back. Craazy went into game development and released a game a few years back. SwishFilmsInc is back too, WalrusGuy returned and also did work on that Arzete CDi-esque game.
author: @OminousBagel

text:
@OminousBagel  craaazycat released a game? What's it called?

I knew about Arzette from the moment it was announced (and am happy to see various YTPers have some sort of involvement in its development) but Craaazycat making a game is news to me.
author: @MrCrossa238

text:
@OminousBagel  meanwhile it's hard to say what deepercutt is doing now, he seems to have a separate channel (because he permanently lost access to the original one many years ago) or is at least making and editing videos elsewhere, but he hasn't given out a link to it because he wanted to start over fresh and not have it be associated with his old life

still relatively active on social media as of last year, at least, where he was reflecting on the past a lot

text: Holy shit! This came out all the way back in mid 2009 and I had no idea this existed til now. *sighs* but why bother, it is on a channel that no longer has any relevance anymore. I was 21 when this vid came out, and now I am 26. Curiosity got the best of me and I had to check if this guy was still was still inactive. No surprises here. Should have known better.. Well funny vid but life moves on. The uploader realized that and he went on with his life. He cared and he wanted to build himself a good future. That is admirable and I suggest we should all do the same!

text: HAHAHAHA! Oh man you are the biggest fanboy. First off, the black album was where they started selling out. They made generic riffs and catchy vocals and even changed their physical looks to appeal to the masses. You know what they did there? THEY MADE METAL POP! That's fucking selling out hard core. Load and reload were shitty hard rock albums, nothing to do with blues. St anger was horrible sell out to death metal, and now they're too old to make real thrash. Any thrash fan should hate them

text:
Cut hare? That's nothing. Rob Halford is bald.
St. Anger? It was just a rushed album.
Lulu? They have been fans of Lou Reed since the beginning. & Art Rock isn't exactly a mainstream music genre, since it's Art Music, much like Classical Music.

text:
People have been saying Metallica are a bunch of sell outs since the Ride The Lightning album.
Ride The Lightning? Ballads don't make them sellouts.
MUsic Video? That video was very antipop. It was a middle finger to MTV
Black Album? Slowing down there material doesn't make them sellouts. Black Sabbath is slow. Megadeth made a similar album & they wheren't called sell outs.
Load & Reload? Haveing Blues influences doesn't make them sellouts. Black Sabbath has Blues elements.

text: @Hatesmonkeys666 Read my PM, move the fuck on your life, I'm sure you have better things to do then live on the internet to annoy me until I cave, bow to your feet and kiss your ass. I myself have better things to do, don't expect a response next time you say something.
author: @CuppaBro1

text: @Hatesmonkeys666 You barely even READ what I said. I said "Back then, they had better standards than they do now," fully implying that Justin Beaver is a sack of shit. God, you just don't know when to shut the fuck up.
author: @CuppaBro1

text:
@Hatesmonkeys666 In addition, "lmfao" isn't a word, you used "their" instead of "they're," you lack several apostrophes in many places where they should be, you never capitalized the word "I" when you should have, and you used "to" instead of "too." Plus, some commas are in places where they'd better be replaced by full stops.
To go a step further, every single word in your comment should have been a full stop.
author: @CuppaBro1

text: @Hatesmonkeys666 If I told you, you'd dismiss it with invalid counterarguments, but here I go. If they had no talent, they wouldn't have gotten a record deal. They had higher standards in the late 70s, before Justin Beaver came along. That's proof they have SOME talent. The rest is subjective. If you don't like 'em, you don't have to shove your opinion down our throat. Also, the "dropped out of preschool" comment was an exaggeration. If you were so much better than me, you'd know that.
author: @CuppaBro1

@Hatesmonkeys666 I can come up with plenty of reasons, but listening doesn't seem to be on your mind. I'll just end the argument right here because arguments on the internet never get anywhere. But two words come to mind, starting with "fuck" and ending with "you."
Besides, at least I have a high school education. You spell like you dropped out of preschool.
